reviewNotes: This dry-run report is generated from an existing config sync plan and does not send live Grocy write requests.
Review the plan at examples/config-sync-plan.example.json before confirming any create or update actions.
A real apply still requires an explicit follow-up run with grocy:apply-config -- --confirm-reviewed-write.

items.name: Example Coffee
items.reason: Repo-managed item differs from live Grocy on non-destructive fields.
